tournament_modes.name: Stock Match
tournament_modes.description: 4-player stock match (3 lives). Last player with stocks wins. Prize pool split by finish order.

tournament_modes.name: Timed KO Race
tournament_modes.description: Most KOs in 3 minutes wins. Track eliminations via stock decrements.

notes: Stock addresses confirmed via libretro-database cheat file — reliable
mupen64plus_next is the recommended accurate N64 core
4-player support makes this ideal for tournament entry fees split 4 ways
KO count derived from stock decrements — no separate KO counter address needed
Recommend disabling items for competitive play
ROM extension .z64 (big-endian) or .n64 (little-endian) — both work with mupen64plus_next
